title: 1m COB LED Strip with 1.5m USB Cable, 8mm Wide, CRI 92+, 5V Warm White LED Strip Lights for TV Backlight, Headboard, Under Cabinet, Self Adhesive LED Tape for Add Lighting, 3000K
features: 1.5m USB Cable: The usb port makes the cob light strip easily be set up as backlight for mirrors, tv or caravan, it can be powered conveniently by a computer, laptop, power bank, wall adaptor, more portable and lightweight

Simple Addition Lighting: 1m led strip with 1.5m long usb cable, 8mm wide, 92+ color render index make it practical and portable, no weird spots, just smooth, continuous lighting, a low cost way to add lighting to your wardrobe, under cabinet, tv backlighting, behind mirror, fireplace
COB Technology: Chips on Board made the usb led strip lights a consistent, bright and even light, creating a soft glow and gorgeous ambiance to your room, smooth, continuous line of lighting
CRI 92+ means the cob strip light can accurately render colour, making objects appear more natural and true
Easy to Install: The strong self adhesive tape and flexibility makes the led tape easily be set up, just plug and play
description: Product Description BERIXDEEP USB 1m COB LED Strip Light, creating attractive ambient lighting for your tv back headboard and interior design BERIXDEEP USB LED light strip is super bright and gives off a nice warm white glow that makes any space feel cosy If you want to add some led lighting but don't want all of the trouble of drives, wiring, connections, etc, then BERIXDEEP usb led strip lights offer a solution. The USB can simply plug into a standard USB charger. 320 leds/m would make the cob led strip much more brighter and uniform, offer a compelling combination of brightness, and color accuracy, create a really nice atmosphere in the evenings Continus and Dotless led lighting strip: you don't see the individual LEDs, but rather a continuous light, which is more eyes friendly, the light strip that gives out a constant bright light without any noticeable individual LED lights Please note that: even if the led strips do not work after installation, we will send a replacement to you freely USB connector rather than a proprietary plug and charger the back of PC monitor, under kitchen cupboards, behind TV, shelf, under a cabinet in office to add extra light This usb led strip is great for room lighting, it can easily be set up as a backlight for mirrors and even the tv with the light being powered by a usb This makes it great for setting up in the car for interior lighting.
